title: MMI 3G High / HNAV first real evidence intake
purpose: Collect read-only identity, UI, DTC and module-context evidence for baseline HNAV-8T1035664F-K0257-D1 without performing configuration or software-write operations.

modules.name: Information Electronics
modules.purpose: Primary HNAV identity and DTC context

modules.name: Camera / Park Assist
modules.purpose: Reverse-camera and OPS context if present

requiredTools: VCDS, ODIS or VCP for read-only identification and DTC capture
Camera or screenshot tool for MMI version and Red Menu identity pages
Stable power support for diagnostic session
Separate raw and sanitized storage locations
photosToCapture: Red Engineering Menu software train page
Red Engineering Menu variant, RadioUnit, MU and sample page
Controller identification screen if diagnostic export is unavailable
Unit label with private identifiers excluded or redacted
autoscanData: Controller part number, component and software version
Coding field presence without publishing a value in this intake
controlModuleMaps: 47 read-only map if needed for audio context
6C or 10 read-only map if needed for camera or OPS context
adaptationMaps: Read-only export only after raw baseline and stable power are available; do not change values
p1TaskGroups: MMI UI and Red Menu evidence gaps
executionOrder: Preserve a clean pre-change state and stable power
Capture Red Menu identity pages only
Run read-only controller identification and DTC capture
Validate JSON, CSV and public-safety controls
Submit for manual review without promoting claims

risks.name: Engineering-menu write action
risks.control: Identity and read-only pages only; do not enter update or emergency paths

risks.name: Accidental coding or adaptation change
risks.control: No write operations and no value changes

risks.name: Publication of private identifiers or paths
risks.control: Keep raw and sanitized copies separate and run public-safety review

risks.name: Unsupported inference from project notes
risks.control: Keep status PARTIAL until raw evidence corroborates identifiers

safety: No full VIN, plate, customer data or private paths in public files
No coding, adaptation, Security Access, dataset or SWDL values in this intake
Raw evidence preserved privately and sanitized copies reviewed separately
Any unclear field remains UNKNOWN, TO_CAPTURE or PARTIAL
expectedResult: A sanitized PARTIAL evidence package that records the known HNAV unit context, identifies missing raw evidence and supports later baseline review without confirming coding, adaptation, Security Access, dataset or conversion behavior.
